title: Grid Lock
description: An ultra-premium, high-speed mathematical puzzle application designed to test mental agility, constraint satisfaction, and focus control. Engineered using native browser mechanics, the system implements automated combinations tracking across a 4x4 data layout grid populated with randomized integers, structured constraint evaluating parameters, a column gravity cascading algorithm that drops surviving upper integers downward while spawning fresh entries at empty top indexes, and score milestones backed natively via client LocalStorage variables.
